author: holgerd77
content:
I'll be doing an experiment over the next couple of days and vibe-code 🤖 a reference/prototype implementation of **EIP-8141 "Frame Transactions"** and live-generate implementation docs along the way which are set up to auto-update on every PR and can be followed upon here:
https://eip-8141-docs.feelyourprotocol.org

(this also turned out to be a nice and gentle intro to the EIP itself - for everyone who wants to catch up - didn't plan for it, "it was claude" 😂, also generated some interesting spec chronology (see docs) out of Magicians, git history,... along the way)

Anyhow: goal is to capture all significant intellectual "artifacts" and milestones within the docs! Excited about that 🤩 to see how this is going, happy for feedback/suggestions, likely best in <#1475556019940884674>!
